title: asplenium filix-femina var. pectinatum
intro: Asplenium filix-femina var. pectinatum, also known as the lady fern, is a rare and unique variety of the maidenhair spleenwort fern plant, characterized by its pectinate fronds. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Asplenium filix-femina var. pectinatum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
